Class LiftManager

java.lang.Object
model.entity.detectable.LiftManager
public class LiftManager extends Object
Main manager for the lifts and their floors, helping with their collisions, updates their positions and command given by the Player.

  • Constructor Summary

    Constructors
    Constructor
    Description
    LiftManager(List<Lift> lifts, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> floors)

  • Constructor Details

    • LiftManager

      public LiftManager(List<Lift> lifts, Map<Integer, List<Integer>> floors)
      LiftManager constructor that collects the lifts and their floors
      Parameters:
      lifts - All the lifts
      floors - Stopping points for the lifts

  • Method Details

    • update

      public void update(Player player, Optional<Ball> ball)
      Updates the lifts if they're moving, pushing the Player and the Ball if is in the way
      Parameters:
      player - Reads the player action, pushes if the lift is moving and sets the lifting moving state
      ball - In case if the ball is in the way and be pushed

    • resetAllLifts

      public void resetAllLifts()
      Reset all lifts in their original position

    • isLift

      public boolean isLift(float x, float y)
      Checks if the given position is within any lift
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to check
      y - Position y to check
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if in the position is within the lift

    • isOnTheLift

      public boolean isOnTheLift(Rectangle2D.Float hitbox, int wTiles)
      Check if the hitbox is on top of the lift
      Parameters:
      hitbox - Hitbox of the entity used to see it's position
      wTiles - Amount of tiles that the width of the entity occupy
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if is right on top or not

    • liftCheckH

      public boolean liftCheckH(float x, float y, int wTiles)
      Horizontal lift check
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to check
      y - Position y to check
      wTiles - Amount of tiles that the width of the entity occupy (used to check like a for)
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if there's a lift all the way horizontally

    • liftCheckV

      public boolean liftCheckV(float x, float y, int hTiles)
      Vertical lift check
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to check
      y - Position y to check
      hTiles - Amount of tiles that the height of the entity occupy (used to check like a for)
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if there's a lift all the way vertically

    • noLiftInTheWay

      public boolean noLiftInTheWay(float x, float y, float w, float h, int wTiles, int hTiles)
      Check if you can move in this position
      Parameters:
      x - Position x to check
      y - Position y to check
      w - Width of the entity
      h - Height of the entity
      wTiles - Amount of tiles that the width of the entity occupy (used to check like a for)
      hTiles - Amount of tiles that the height of the entity occupy (used to check like a for)
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if there's no lift in the way

    • isFullyOn

      public boolean isFullyOn(Player player)
      Check if the player is fully on the lift setting also the current lift the Player is on
      Parameters:
      player - Used to see if the player is fully on the lift
      Returns:
      boolean Result of the check if the player is fully on the lift

    • commandLift

      public void commandLift(int action, Player player)
      Given a command, applies on all the lifts of the same x
      Parameters:
      action - Tells where to go (-1 = UP or 1 = DOWN)
      player - Set to the lifting moving state

    • getLifts

      public List<Lift> getLifts()
